Order.title: Order
Order.description: A customer order for food items.

itemId.description: The ID of the menu item ordered.

itemName.description: The name of the menu item ordered.

quantity.description: The quantity of the item ordered.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the customer.

location.description: The delivery location or room number.

specialInstructions.description: Any special instructions for the order.

status.description: The current status of the order.

createdAt.description: The time the order was placed.

totalPrice.description: The total price of the order.
